name: Sosa Undercover
overview: “Sosa Undercover” is a digital spin-off of Undercover Underage, following Roo Powell and the SOSA team as they continue their mission to expose online child predators. Produced for YouTube, the series shows real-time undercover operations, digital investigations, and the emotional toll of confronting exploitation head-on. Raw and unfiltered, it offers a closer, behind-the-scenes look at how predators are identified and brought to light.
